title: chore(deps): update dependency algoliasearch to v3.32.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| algoliasearch | devDependencies | minor | `3.30.0` -> `3.32.0` | [homepage](https://www.algolia.com/doc/api-client/javascript/), [source](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>algolia/algoliasearch-client-js</summary>

### [`v3.32.0`](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​3320)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/compare/3.31.0...3.32.0)

> 2018-12-17

-   FEAT(personalization): add new methods for the strategy
    -   `getPersonalizationStrategy(cb)`: retrieve the currently set strategy
    -   `setPersonalizationStrategy(strategy, cb)`: set the personalization strategy
        -   a `strategy` is an object containing `eventsScoring` and `facetsScoring`
    -   see also <https://www.algolia.com/doc/rest-api/personalization>

### [`v3.31.0`](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​3310)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-js/compare/3.30.0...3.31.0)

> 2018-12-04

-   FEAT(places): add `.reverse({ aroundLatLng: '' })` to reverse geo-code
-   CHORE: deprecated `similarSearch()`, instead use `.search({ similarQuery: '' })`

</details>
